fields.title: Fruits, vegetables and asthma control
fields.body: Diets rich in fruits and vegetables are associated with reduced airway inflammation and fewer asthma symptoms, likely due to antioxidants and dietary fiber.

fields.title: Omega-3 fatty acids and heart disease
fields.body: Marine omega-3 fatty acids from oily fish lower triglycerides and may reduce the risk of coronary heart disease and cardiac arrhythmias.

fields.title: Ketogenic diets in cancer therapy
fields.body: Very low carbohydrate ketogenic diets have been studied as an adjuvant to cancer treatment, aiming to limit glucose availability to tumor cells.

fields.title: Vitamin D status and bone health
fields.body: Adequate vitamin D supports calcium absorption and bone mineral density, reducing the risk of osteoporosis and fractures in older adults.

fields.title: Coffee consumption and cardiovascular risk
fields.body: Moderate coffee intake is not associated with increased cardiovascular disease and may have a neutral to slightly protective effect in most adults.

fields.title: The Mediterranean diet and longevity
fields.body: A Mediterranean dietary pattern emphasizing olive oil, legumes, whole grains, fish and vegetables is linked to lower all-cause mortality.

fields.title: Dietary fiber and the gut microbiome
fields.body: Fermentable fiber feeds beneficial gut bacteria that produce short-chain fatty acids, supporting metabolic and immune health.

fields.title: Antioxidants, oxidative stress and aging
fields.body: Polyphenols and other antioxidants neutralize reactive oxygen species, a mechanism implicated in slowing cellular aging processes.

fields.title: Sugar intake, insulin resistance and type 2 diabetes
fields.body: High consumption of added sugars and refined carbohydrates promotes insulin resistance and raises the risk of developing type 2 diabetes.

fields.title: Physical exercise and mental health
fields.body: Regular aerobic and resistance exercise reduces symptoms of depression and anxiety and improves cognitive function across the lifespan.
